expectations.text: card() function returns Dom.Element as reusable component
expectations.evidence: Function properly returns Dom.Element wrapping the complete card structure

expectations.text: Component accepts varargs (Dom*) for flexible children content
expectations.evidence: Function parameter accepts variable number of Dom elements, properly passed to card body

expectations.text: Optional title parameter with Option[String] type uses Option.map pattern
expectations.evidence: title: Option[String] properly uses Option.map for conditional rendering

expectations.text: Optional footer parameter with Option[Dom] type uses Option.map pattern
expectations.evidence: footer: Option[Dom] properly uses Option.map for conditional footer rendering

expectations.text: Conditional className based on 'starred' parameter, adds 'card-highlighted' class correctly
expectations.evidence: starred parameter correctly influences className tuple, adding 'card-highlighted' when appropriate

expectations.text: Alternative .when() pattern demonstrated for conditional attributes (cardWithWhen function)
expectations.evidence: cardWithWhen function demonstrates .when() pattern for alternative conditional attribute approach
